title: Therthangal Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Therthangal Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Therthangal Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in Ramanathapuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Therthangal Bird Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary in Ramanathapuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Established in 2010, it is spread across an area of 29.295 ha (72.39 acres). It has been designated as a protected Ramsar site since 2024.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Therthangal Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Therthangal Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Therthangal Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (85 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (88 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Therthangal Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Therthangal Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Therthangal Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Therthangal Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
